mapper.sql: id, author_id, author_name, title, summary, content_url, category, tags, status, review_reason, view_count, like_count, created_at, updated_at, published_at, submitted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (id, author_id, author_name, title, summary, content_url, category, tags, status, review_reason, view_count, like_count, created_at, updated_at, published_at, submitted_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{contentUrl}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{status}, #{reviewReason}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{publishedAt}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE articles SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, content_url = #{contentUrl}, category = #{category}, tags = #{tags}, status = #{status}, review_reason = #{reviewReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE articles SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE articles SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM articles WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM articles WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM articles WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM articles WHERE tags LIKE '%' || #{tag} || '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM articles WHERE title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR summary LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR tags LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles WHERE status = #{status}
